title: Device(headset) inventory details
scenario: Verify that connected headset inventory details (model, serial number, last detected, software version) are displayed correctly after logging into the Lens app and selecting a device from the inventory.
steps: Start the Lens app with the headset connected.
Navigate to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account.
Click on a device from the inventory.
expected: Connected device details such as device model, serial number, last detected, and software version are visible.
